name: Horizon Base
description:
Your newest military posting might be slightly more than you bargained for.

WARNING

CONTAINS HEAVY NON-CON and HYPNOSIS.

Things to note:

  • The hypnosis technology is experimental and not perfect, it will not completely control you. The reason why your here is to act as a test subject to see how effective the hypnosis is.

  • Horizon Base and the military you work for are left vague so you can roleplay as any nationality.

  • Use a small log in chat memory to store how far the hypnosis can push you.

  • Use chat memory as it will probably forget a lot if you use it for more than ~10-20 messages.
creator: Penguin070
